name: Slider
description: Range slider with single and dual thumb modes.

api.name: Slider
api.description: Range slider with single and dual thumb modes.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name exposed via aria-label on the underlying range input. Required for WCAG compliance when the slider is not visually labelled by adjacent text connected via for/htmlFor. For range sliders (IsRange=true) the end handle's aria-label is automatically suffixed with "(end)".

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: Culture used for the default tooltip/mark value formatting. When null (default) falls back to CurrentCulture. Ignored when FormatTooltip is supplied.

mdSummary:
# Slider

Range slider with single and dual thumb modes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/slider

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Slider | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Slider | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Slider | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Slider | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Slider | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Slider | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Slider | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Slider | Value | `double` | `` |  |
| Slider | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<double>` | `` |  |
| Slider | IsRange | `bool` | `` |  |
| Slider | ValueEnd | `double` | `` |  |
| Slider | ValueEndChanged | `EventCallback<double>` | `` |  |
| Slider | Min | `double` | `0` |  |
| Slider | Max | `double` | `100` |  |
| Slider | Step | `double` | `1` |  |
| Slider | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Slider | Orientation | `string` | `"Horizontal"` |  |
| Slider | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name exposed via aria-label on the underlying range input. Required for WCAG compliance when the slider is not visually labelled by adjacent text connected via for/htmlFor. For range sliders (IsRange=true) the end handle's aria-label is automatically suffixed with "(end)". |
| Slider | ShowTooltip | `bool` | `` |  |
| Slider | Marks | `List<double>?` | `` |  |
| Slider | ShowTicks | `bool` | `` |  |
| Slider | FormatTooltip | `Func<double, string>?` | `` |  |
| Slider | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Culture used for the default tooltip/mark value formatting. When null (default) falls back to CurrentCulture. Ignored when FormatTooltip is supplied. |
| Slider | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Slider | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
